calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance bridge EVIDENCE re-run on the STABILIZED base harm landscape (5-arm continuous-survival; supersedes 603o)
items.note: Corrected SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance-bridge EVIDENCE re-run on the now-stabilized base harm landscape (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-603p Branch B). 603o self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue because the base harm landscape was seed-fragile (1/3 seeds). The 2026-06-16 scaffolded_sd054_onboarding harm-pathway STABILIZATION amend (scaffold_harm_pathway_encoder_lr=3e-4 + scaffold_harm_pathway_warmup_steps=250, in ALL 5 arms base config, NOT a global LR raise) now clears harm_eval_range>=0.02 on 3/3 seeds at proximity_harm=0.10 (in-session proof-of-fix validation at reduced budget: ranges [0.0245,0.0541,0.0278], corr 0.70-0.85; seeds 43+44 flipped FAIL->PASS vs 603p). 5-arm continuous-mean-survival primary; the base-harm-landscape harm_eval_range>=0.02 on >=2/3 seeds is RETAINED as the FIRST self-routing non-vacuity precondition (self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at full scale if under-powered, never a false bridge verdict). claim_ids=[SD-059, MECH-358]; evidence; supersedes 603o. behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-C.
